remember: Define the concept of local government and explain its significance.
List the different types of local governments in India (e.g. Panchayat Raj Institutions, Municipal Corporations).
Identify the key features of the 73rd and 74th Constitutional Amendments.
understand: Explain the role of local governments in promoting decentralization and participatory governance.
Describe the functions and powers of local governments in India (e.g. taxation, law and order, public services).
Analyze the impact of local government on the lives of citizens (e.g. access to basic services, representation).
apply: Identify examples of successful local government initiatives (e.g. sanitation drives, community development projects).
Evaluate the effectiveness of local governments in addressing local issues (e.g. poverty, education).
Design a model for a local government in a hypothetical scenario.
analyze: Analyze the relationship between local governments and state governments in India (e.g. powers, limitations).
Examine the challenges faced by local governments in India (e.g. limited resources, corruption).
Compare and contrast the local government systems of different countries.

ncert_objectives: Understand the concept of local government and its importance in the Indian Constitution.
Learn about the different types of local governments in India and their functions.
Study the 73rd and 74th Constitutional Amendments and their impact on local governance.
board_exam_objectives: Define local government and explain its significance (Class 11 Political Science).
Describe the types of local governments in India and their functions (Class 11 Political Science).
Explain the key features of the 73rd and 74th Constitutional Amendments (Class 11 Political Science).
